storylines.title: US-Israel Military Operations Against Iran and Escalating Middle East Crisis
storylines.description: A major military escalation involving coordinated US-Israeli strikes against Iran, resulting in the reported death of Iran's Supreme Leader, multiple casualties, and widespread regional disruption

storylines.title: Domestic Political Response to Iran Military Operations
storylines.description: Congressional and political reactions to the Trump-ordered military operations against Iran, including partisan divisions and criticism from various political figures

storylines.title: Global Economic and Market Impact of Middle East Military Crisis
storylines.description: The economic ramifications of the US-Israeli strikes on Iran, particularly affecting oil markets and global financial systems

storylines.title: Military Operations Collateral Impact
storylines.description: Secondary military incidents and casualties related to the broader Middle East operations

storylines.title: Iran's International Isolation and Cultural Impact
storylines.description: The broader effects of the military crisis on Iran's international relationships and participation in global events
